description: Style NoteTake your training sessions to the next level with this T-shirt from nike. The striking blue colour and the Dri-Fit fabric make it a perfect pick for that sporty look. Team it with tracks and performance shoes and play hard on the field.Product DetailsBlue crew neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and Nike swoosh print on the left chestMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanUse warm ironLow tumble dry
